title: SIP Refer EventHook Payload
description: Payload sent to the sip-refer eventHook when a SIP NOTIFY is received with transfer status updates.

event.description: Event type — always 'transfer-status' for REFER notifications.

call_status.description: SIP status code from the NOTIFY sipfrag body (e.g. 100 for trying, 180 for ringing, 200 for success).
